Service contract for AI-assisted recommendations, summaries, risk analysis, and chat.

File-backed implementation of AI assistant recommendations, summaries, risk analysis, and chat.
AiAssistantServiceImpl(FileStorage) - Constructor for class com.group02.tars.service.impl.AiAssistantServiceImpl
Creates the service using the default AI provider and no upload directory.

Creates the service using the default AI provider and an upload directory.

Analyzes TA workload and role-level risk signals for administrators.

Returns the user service.

Service contract for registration, login, profile lookup, and TA profile updates.
UserServiceImpl - Class in com.group02.tars.service.impl
File-backed implementation of registration, login, lookup, and TA profile updates.
UserServiceImpl(FileStorage) - Constructor for class com.group02.tars.service.impl.UserServiceImpl
Creates the service with shared file storage.

W

weeklyHours - Variable in class com.group02.tars.entity.Job
Expected weekly workload in hours.
workload(String) - Method in interface com.group02.tars.service.AdminService
Builds TA workload rows with optional risk filtering.
workload(String) - Method in class com.group02.tars.service.impl.AdminServiceImpl
Builds TA workload rows and filters them by risk level when requested.
writeError(HttpServletResponse, int, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.group02.tars.util.JsonResponse
Writes an error JSON response without detail entries.
writeError(HttpServletResponse, int, String, String, String, List<String>) - Static method in class com.group02.tars.util.JsonResponse
Writes an error JSON response with optional detail entries.
writeServiceError(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse, ServiceException) - Method in class com.group02.tars.controller.api.BaseApiServlet
Writes a service-layer error as the standard JSON error envelope.
writeSuccess(HttpServletResponse, int, Object, Object) - Static method in class com.group02.tars.util.JsonResponse
Writes a successful JSON response.
writeUnknownError(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse, Exception) - Method in class com.group02.tars.controller.api.BaseApiServlet
Writes an unexpected exception as a standard internal error response.
